sect1.title: platform.c
sect1.para: This file demonstrates the Xilinx SDI Tx to SDI Rx loopback design for kcu116 board.

sect1.title: platform.h
sect1.para: This directory contains the files needed for FMC initialization.
You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use xv_sdirxss driver.

sect1.title: platform.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XV_SdiRxss driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest to test the sub-core functions.
For details, see xv_sdirxss_selftest_example.c.

sect1.title: platform.c
sect1.para: This file contains low-level driver functions for Uart_16550 initialization and disabling and enabling the caches

sect1.title: platform.h
sect1.para: This file contains prototypes of disabling and enabling caches.

sect1.title: platform_config.h
sect1.para: This file contains definitions of certain IPs like PS Uart etc.

sect1.title: si5324drv.c
sect1.para: This file contains low-level driver functions for controlling the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator as mounted on the ZCU106 demo board

sect1.title: si5324drv.h
sect1.para: This file contains definitions that are being used by low-level driver functions for controlling the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator as mounted on the ZCU106 demo board

sect1.title: xsdi_example.c
sect1.para: This file demonstrates the Xilinx SDI Rx Subsystem and SDI Tx Subsystem

sect1.title: xsdi_menu.c
sect1.para: This file contains the Xilinx Menu implementation as used in the SDI example design

sect1.title: xsdi_menu.h
sect1.para: This is the main header file for the Xilinx Menu implementation as used in the SDI example design

sect1.title: platform.c
sect1.para: This file contains low-level driver functions for Uart_16550 initialization and disabling and enabling the caches

sect1.title: platform.h
sect1.para: This file contains prototypes of disabling and enabling caches.

sect1.title: platform_config.h
sect1.para: This file contains definitions of certain IPs like PS Uart etc.

sect1.title: si5324drv.c
sect1.para: This file contains low-level driver functions for controlling the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator as mounted on the ZCU106 demo board

sect1.title: si5324drv.h
sect1.para: This file contains definitions that are being used by low-level driver functions for controlling the SiliconLabs Si5324 clock generator as mounted on the ZCU106 demo board

sect1.title: xsdi_example.c
sect1.para: This file demonstrates the Xilinx SDI Rx Subsystem

sect1.title: xsdi_menu.c
sect1.para: This file contains the Xilinx Menu implementation as used in the SDI example design

sect1.title: xsdi_menu.h
sect1.para: This is the main header file for the Xilinx Menu implementation as used in the SDI example design
